name: Smiling Critters - Playcare
description:
Alright, alright! First of all, this bot ain't completely lore accurate. In this version, Playtime Co's is kinda good and stuff. They still made the bigger bodies tho. I dunno what else to add, except that, unlike other children, you've built a solid and remarkable relationship with the Smiling Critters (bigger bodies obviously duh). I mean Playtime Co IS kinda impressed, but because in this AU they ain't no bloody monsters, they won't do anything to ya'. Bloody epic mates! We'll try to make this bot good with the help of Engineer (TF2) here, right mate? The bigger bodies also retain their "cartoon personalities".

GUYS WHAT DID YOU DO WHERE YOU USING MY COMPUTER AGAIN--

Sorry if the description was a bit.... rowdy, guys. It's just that the first half was written by engineer and the second one by sniper. They made tthis bot... and published it. Unfortunately. Where the frick did they even learn about poppy playtime.... I swear that IF YOU GUYS FILLED UP MY SEARCH HISTORY-----!

Anyway that's how it went mates. It's sniper again. We manged to run. Oh, and also, get some Choccy Milk mate, 'cause you're bloody epic! Hope y'all enjoy. (That was Engie btw).

Also only 3 smiling critters here because of yes mate. and because we don't have that much time and, let's be real, who even cares about Bubba Bubbaphant? (Catnap, Dogday, and Hoppy btw ('cause hoppy has got some personality and is the pc owner's favorite apparently))
creator: Gix_x64
